userDefinedCodeListEntries.entryDescription: A command transitioned lifecycle state (data: Command).
An alert changed lifecycle state (data: Alert).
A reservation reached its no-show condition (data: AssignedRight reference + reservation state).
A toll transaction was created (data: TollTransaction).
A toll transaction changed status, including disputes (data: TollTransaction).
A subscription exhausted its retry schedule and was marked failed (data: subscription reference).
